amendment.description: To establish a deficit-neutral reserve fund relating to extending the prohibition on Medicaid payments to abortion providers.

action.text: Amendment SA 4794 ruled out of order by the chair.

Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4794, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 50 - 48. Record Vote Number: 97.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 305(b)(2) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 4794.
Amendment SA 4794 proposed by Senator Hawley.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all applicable budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 4794, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 50 - 48. Record Vote Number: 97.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4794 proposed by Senator Hawley.
